{{Quote|Did you find the Afarathu Cult lair?|A Selonian diplomat, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:SD">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|Selonian Diplomat|Corellia}}</ref>}}
The '''''Afarathu'' Cave''' was a cave on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], located near the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Doaba Guerfel/Legends|Doaba Guerfel]]. It was inhabited by the ''[[Afarathu]]'' extremists.

==History==
{{Quote|The Afarathu are slime though. You won't be able to enter their cave without a fight.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Velso]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:V">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Corellian Corvette Pre-Quest: "Lt. Velso"}}</ref>}}
The cave served as headquarters for the ''Afarathu'',<ref name="SWG:AC" /> a [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] terrorist sect which aimed to drive the [[Drall (planet)|Dralls]] and the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] from the worlds of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].<ref name="CDAG">{{SonyCite|url=players/guides.vm?id=80112|text=CorSec Database A-G|int=CorSec Database A-G}}</ref> It was used for many years prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] by the vicious ''Afarathu'' extremists to stage their strikes against Corellian interests.<ref name="SWG:AC" />

Very few knew the location of the cave; the former [[Cult of Lord Nyax|Follower of Nyax]] [[Lock Vlash]] was one of them.<ref name="SWG:LV">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|Lock Vlash|Corellia}}</ref> After the Battle of Yavin, a Selonian diplomat in Doaba Guerfel recruited a spacer to fight the ''Afarathu'' Selonians at the cave.<ref name="SWG:SD" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> some ''Afarathu'' fought [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces on Corellia. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Velso]] later dispatched a spacer to the cave in order to retrieve the ship destruct sequence codes of a Rebel [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian Corvette]] possibly stolen by the ''Afarathu'' during the skirmish.<ref name="SWG:V" />

The same year, a spacer visited the cave and collected a [[Fallann hyper-rifle]].<ref name="SWG:RRWMII">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Rare Rifle Weapons Mark II}}</ref>
